title: BgRaster Runtime State Schema
description: Schema for BgRaster runtime state files (lastRun.toml, lastRun.dry.toml). Include a $schema comment at the top: # $schema: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/gameshowpro/BgRaster/refs/heads/main/docs/schemas/bgraster-lastrun.schema.json

version.description: Executable semantic version (SemVer2) from Nerdbank.GitVersioning, e.g. 1.0.0+build.1

settingsHash.description: SHA-256 hash of the effective configuration model (post TOML+CLI merge) used in this run

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when this run occurred

assignedFiles.description: Map of hardware output IDs to successfully assigned PNG file paths

unrecycledFiles.description: List of stale PNG files that could not be recycled (locked, permission denied)

hardware_output.description: Detected physical outputs and their properties (hardware profile)

id.description: Stable PnP device instance path (monitorDevicePath) from DisplayConfigGetDeviceInfo, e.g. \\?\DISPLAY#SAM0C7F#5&1a2b3c4d&0&UID256#{e6f07b5f-...}

index.description: Zero-based output index assigned by sort order (desktopY asc, desktopX asc, id asc)

desktopX.description: Virtual desktop position X in pixels (top-left corner)

desktopY.description: Virtual desktop position Y in pixels (top-left corner)

widthPx.description: True hardware width in pixels (PerMonitorV2 DPI-aware, not scaled by OS DPI factor)

heightPx.description: True hardware height in pixels (PerMonitorV2 DPI-aware, not scaled by OS DPI factor)

adapterName.description: Adapter device name (e.g. \\.\DISPLAY1) for logging purposes

friendlyName.description: Friendly monitor name from DisplayConfigGetDeviceInfo, used in diagnostics and ${OutputName} substitution
